form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 7th of 11 at Sanliurfa on March 23 over 1200m, 14 len behind Come And See with 56.5kg at $13.75. Previously second-up 3rd of 11 at this track on July 2 over 1200m, 1.2 len behind Prenses Matra carrying 57kg at $14.60. Unlikely to threaten.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Second-up. First-up after four months 7th of 11 at Sanliurfa on March 23 over 1200m, 14 len behind Come And See with 56.5kg at $13.75. Previously second-up 3rd of 11 at this track on July 2 over 1200m, 1.2 len behind Prenses Matra carrying 57kg at $14.60. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 9 at Sanliurfa on March 30 over 1300m, 9 len behind King Of The Field carrying 58kg at $6.65. Before that 5th of 11 at Sanliurfa on March 23 over 1200m, 6 len behind Come And See carrying 56.5kg at $2.60. Can do a lot better than that last run.

form.formComment: Comes off a 50 day let-up. At the latest run 9th of 11 at Antalya on February 17 over 1400m, 35 len behind Neuro Math carrying 56.5kg at $29.25. The run before that 6th of 8 at Antalya on January 27 over 1600m, 17 len behind Maegelle carrying 60kg at $17.35. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

formComments.title: TAB

The run before that 6th of 8 at Antalya on January 27 over 1600m, 17 len behind Maegelle carrying 60kg at $17.35. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign fourth of 8 at this track November 19 over 1600m, 11 len behind Dance Of Wind with 57kg at $4.60. On debut fourth of 10 at this track July 9 over 1200m, 21 len behind Steel Father with 57kg at $23.60. This is an ideal race to kick off. Top hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-15.5). Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign fourth of 8 at this track November 19 over 1600m, 11 len behind Dance Of Wind with 57kg at $4.60. On debut fourth of 10 at this track July 9 over 1200m, 21 len behind Steel Father with 57kg at $23.60. This is an ideal race to kick off. Top hope.

form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since he finished last of 10 at Sanliurfa December 15 over 1300m, 74 len behind Berat Kaan carrying 57kg at $21.35. On debut third of 10 at this track October 8 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Golden Cooger carrying 57kg at $24.25. Others rate better.

On debut third of 10 at this track October 8 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Golden Cooger carrying 57kg at $24.25. Others rate better.

form.formComment: Most recently scored a big 3.5 len win at this track April 1 over 1200m defeating Goodbye carrying 58kg at $4.40. Before that second last of 11 at Sanliurfa on March 16 over 1900m, 78 len behind Rotaci with 55kg at $3. Can go on with the job.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-26). Most recently scored a big 3.5 len win at this track April 1 over 1200m defeating Goodbye carrying 58kg at $4.40. Before that second last of 11 at Sanliurfa on March 16 over 1900m, 78 len behind Rotaci with 55kg at $3. Can go on with the job.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at this track on April 1 over 1500m, 6 len behind Jazzmaster carrying 60kg at $3.55. The race before that 4th of 11 at Sanliurfa on March 23 over 1200m, 5 len behind Come And See with 51kg at $25.55. Ideally placed to play a significant role.

form.formComment: Most recently 4th in a small field at this track on April 1 over 1500m, 16 len behind Jazzmaster carrying 55kg at $14.60. The race before that ran last in a small field at Sirinyer All Weather on February 13 over 1400m, 14 len behind Onderbeyim carrying 50kg at $21.90. Faces a tough task.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after three months 13th of 17 at Sanliurfa on February 25 over 1200m, 27 len behind Mete Koc Bey carrying 52kg at $33.45. Previously second-up 10th of 13 at Sanliurfa on October 27 over 1400m, 58 len behind Kardaha carrying 57kg at $10.45. Needs to lift.
